businessRules: Tenant-scoped by current user
Batches exclude CONSUMED and RECALLED

Near expiry is within 90 days from CURRENT_DATE

Last 12 months
Positive batches excluding CONSUMED and RECALLED
Monthly aggregation from inventory transaction date
Tenant-scoped

Requires quantity > 0
Excludes CONSUMED and RECALLED batches

Positive active batches only

businessRules: Last sale is MAX issue transaction date
Dead threshold controlled by deadMonths
Uses issue transactions
Consumption value is issue quantity times unit cost
Class A/B/C based on cumulative percentage thresholds
Builds monthly demand series for active products
Class X/Y/Z based on coefficient of variation thresholds
COGS is issue quantity times unit cost
Turnover null when inventory value is zero
Sales voucher types S plus returns R/T
Compatible lines S=>G/S/O, R=>R, T=>X/T
Amounts use ABS

Purchase voucher types P plus return B

Invalid dimensions rejected by service
